segments.text: Then I turned and raised my eyes, and saw there a flying scroll.
And he said to me,
What do you see?
segments.speaker: Unidentified Angel

segments.text: So I answered,
I see a flying scroll. Its length is twenty cubits and its width ten cubits.
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: Then he said to me,

This is the curse that goes out over the face of the whole earth: 'Every thief shall be expelled,' according to this side of the scroll; and, 'Every perjurer shall be expelled,' according to that side of it.
segments.speaker: Unidentified Angel

segments.text: I will send out the curse. It shall enter the house of the thief And the house of the one who swears falsely by My name. It shall remain in the midst of his house And consume it, with its timber and stones.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

verses.title: Vision of the Woman in a Basket

segments.text: Then the angel who talked with me came out and said to me,
Lift your eyes now, and see what this is that goes forth.
segments.speaker: Unidentified Angel

segments.text: So I asked,
What is it?
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: And he said,
It is a basket that is going forth.
segments.speaker: Unidentified Angel

segments.text: He also said,
This is their resemblance throughout the earth:
segments.speaker: Unidentified Angel

segments.text: Here is a lead disc lifted up, and this is a woman sitting inside the basket
Then he said,
This is Wickedness!
segments.speaker: Unidentified Angel

segments.text: And he thrust her down into the basket, and threw the lead cover over its mouth.
Then I raised my eyes and looked, and there were two women, coming with the wind in their wings; for they had wings like the wings of a stork, and they lifted up the basket between earth and heaven.
So I said to the angel who talked with me,
Where are they carrying the basket?
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: And he said to me,
To build a house for it in the land of Shinar; when it is ready, the basket will be set there on its base.
segments.speaker: Unidentified Angel
